en_title: Final Fantasy 7 Revelation Getting Story Expansion Pass, Store Leak Suggests
cn_title: 《Final Fantasy 7 Revelation》或将推出剧情扩展通行证
subtitle: 终章还要加料
opus_summary: Epic Games Store数据库出现《最终幻想7 重制版 启示录》剧情扩展通行证和最多9个DLC占位符，粉丝猜测可能涉及《圣子降临》或《地狱犬的挽歌》。

paragraphs.en: Final Fantasy 7 fans are getting excited for a Story Expansion pass that has been glimpsed as part of a new store leak.
paragraphs.cn: 《最终幻想7》粉丝正因为一次新的商店泄露而兴奋不已，因为其中出现了一个剧情扩展通行证。

paragraphs.en: The Final Fantasy 7 Revelation Story Expansion Pass can be seen right now via a listing spotted lurking in the depths of the Epic Games Store database, along with placeholders for up to nine DLC packs.
paragraphs.cn: 现在，通过Epic Games Store数据库深处被发现的一条列表，可以看到《最终幻想7 重制版 启示录》剧情扩展通行证，同时还出现了最多9个DLC包的占位符。

paragraphs.en: It's unknown what these DLCs might be for — so anything from fully-fledged expansions to simple costume or item packs are possible. But the existence of a specifically-labelled "Story Expansion Pass" suggests some of these, at least, will be additions that comprise fresh narrative.
paragraphs.cn: 这些DLC具体会是什么，目前尚不清楚，所以从完整扩展内容到简单服装包或道具包都有可能。但一个明确标注为「剧情扩展通行证」的东西存在，说明其中至少有一部分会是包含全新叙事的追加内容。

paragraphs.en: Already, fans are speculating over what these DLCs might comprise, with hopes that elements could be adapted from animated spinoff movie Final Fantasy 7: Advent Children, or third-person shooter Dirge of Cerberus: Final Fantasy 7.
paragraphs.cn: 粉丝已经开始猜测这些DLC可能包含什么，并希望其中有些元素能改编自动画衍生电影《最终幻想7：圣子降临》，或第三人称射击游戏《地狱犬的挽歌：最终幻想7》。

paragraphs.en: Other fans are excited to see Genesis, the primary antagonist in Crisis Core: Final Fantasy VII, an action role-playing spinoff released for the PSP. Exactly what will — and won't — be adapted remains to be seen, though this is likely Square Enix's last and best chance to add extra elements to its Final Fantasy 7 remaster project, making it feel as complete as possible.
paragraphs.cn: 还有一些粉丝期待看到Genesis登场。Genesis是PSP动作角色扮演衍生作《核心危机：最终幻想7》中的主要反派。究竟哪些内容会被改编、哪些不会，目前仍有待观察。不过，这很可能是Square Enix给自己的《最终幻想7》重制项目加入额外元素、让它尽可能显得完整的最后也是最好机会。

paragraphs.en: Final Fantasy 7 Remake launched back in 2020 for PS4, with its enhanced Integrade version later launching for PS5, PC, Nintendo Switch 2 and Xbox Series X/S. The trilogy's second slice, Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth, is also now available across all platforms. Final Fantasy 7 Revelation, the concluding chapter, is currently set for launch in the first half of next year.
paragraphs.cn: 《最终幻想7 重制版》最早于2020年登陆PS4，增强版Intergrade后来登陆PS5、PC、Nintendo Switch 2和XBOX Series。三部曲的第二部《最终幻想7 重生》如今也已登陆所有平台。终章《最终幻想7 重制版 启示录》目前计划于明年上半年推出。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。
